description: SaaS-específico: land expansion, net dollar retention, logo retention, expansion revenue

items.name: Land Expansion (ABM for SaaS)
items.tactic: Land = first deal. Expansion = upsell + cross-sell. Land-Expand-Expand formula.
items.metrics: CAC, LTV, CAC:LTV ratio 1:3+, MRR growth
items.execution: Land: ICP targeting + outbound + product-led growth. Expand: CS onboarding + feature adoption + upsell.

items.name: Net Dollar Retention (NDR > 120% = rocket)
items.tactic: NDR = (MRR_start + expansión - churn) / MRR_start. Si >120%, business se crece sin nuevos customers.

items.name: Product-Led Growth (usage → conversion)
items.tactic: Free tier → freemium → paid. Users experience value antes de pagar. Conversion 5-10% si aha moment day 7.
items.metrics: DAU, activation rate, time to value
